title: refactor: simplify auth middleware
diff:
diff --git a/middleware.py b/middleware.py
index ...
-    if user and user.is_active:
-        if user.has_perm('login'):
-            return True
+    if user and user.is_active and user.has_perm('login'):
+        return True

files.patch:
@@ -5,3 +5,2 @@
-    if user and user.is_active:
-        if user.has_perm('login'):
-            return True
+    if user and user.is_active and user.has_perm('login'):
+        return True
